tuning: E A D G B E
content:
(This arrangement is in the key of F)
(To play in the original recorded key of C, transpose down -5)

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Listen as your day unfolds, challenge what the future holds[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
Try and keep your head up to the sky[/tab]

Lovers, they may cause you tears
Go ahead release your fears, stand up and be counted
Don't be ashamed to cry
You gotta be

{Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]                    [ch]F/C[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Dm7[/ch]
You gotta be bad,  you gotta be bold, you gotta be wiser[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]                    [ch]F/C[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
You gotta be hard, you gotta be tough, you gotta be stronger[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]                    [ch]F/C[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]
You gotta be cool, you gotta be calm, you gotta stay together[/tab]
[tab][ch]DbM9[/ch]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
    All I know, all I know, Love will save the day[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Herald what your mother said / Read the books your father read[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
Try to solve the puzzles in your own sweet time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]                                [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Some may have more cash than you / Others take a different view, [/tab]
[tab][ch]DbM9[/ch]  [ch]Bb/C[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
my    oh    my / hey, hey[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]                    [ch]F/C[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Dm7[/ch]
You gotta be bad,  you gotta be bold, you gotta be wiser[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]                    [ch]F/C[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
You gotta be hard, you gotta be tough, you gotta be stronger[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]                    [ch]F/C[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]
You gotta be cool, you gotta be calm, you gotta stay together[/tab]
[tab][ch]DbM9[/ch]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
    All I know, all I know, Love will save the day[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                             [ch]F/A[/ch]
Time asks no questions, it goes on without you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Leaving you behind if you can't stand the pace[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                                     [ch]F/A[/ch]
World keeps on spinning, can't stop it, if you try to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]
This time it's danger staring you in the face[/tab]
Whoa,  Remember

[Verse 3]
Listen as your day unfolds
Challenge what the future holds
Try and keep your head up to the sky
Lovers, they may cause you tears
Go ahead release your fears, my oh my heh, hey, hey

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]                    [ch]F/C[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Dm7[/ch]
You gotta be bad,  you gotta be bold, you gotta be wiser[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]                    [ch]F/C[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
You gotta be hard, you gotta be tough, you gotta be stronger[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb2[/ch]                    [ch]F/C[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]
You gotta be cool, you gotta be calm, you gotta stay together[/tab]
[tab][ch]DbM9[/ch]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
    All I know, all I know, Love will save the day[/tab]
[tab][ch]DbM9[/ch]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
    All I know, all I know, Love will save the day[/tab]
